description_long: This is a large, menacing sword with a broad, single-edged blade that features a pronounced curve and a sharp, pointed tip. The blade is entirely black, with subtle angular lines and grooves running along its surface, giving it a modern, almost futuristic appearance. The hilt is equipped with a small, angular guard that extends slightly outward, providing some protection to the wielder's hand. The handle is straight, slender, and ends in a rounded pommel, appearing to be made of the same dark material as the blade. The overall design is sleek and aggressive, with no visible ornamentation or embellishments. Its imposing size and dark coloration suggest it is intended more for combat or display than for practical kitchen use.
description: A large, black, curved sword with a broad blade, angular guard, and a straight, slender handle ending in a rounded pommel. The design is sleek, modern, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the broad, curved blade and the angular guard with the straight handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle and pommel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the broad, curved blade and angular guard, with the handle visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the blade's thin profile and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, slender, black, rounded pommel, smooth surface
